selections.name: Royal Ribbons
selections.reason: First starter drawing a highly advantageous inside barrier at Taree. Local trainer and trial was adequate.

selections.name: That Piece
selections.reason: Tassort filly with a reasonable trial at Wyong. Should handle the going and gets a fair draw.

selections.name: Bring It On Sal
selections.reason: Sebring Sun filly debuting for Allan Kehoe. Trialled fairly but draws a bit wide for the tight 1000m.

selections.name: Sideact
selections.reason: Acrobat gelding with blinkers on for debut. Wide draw is a negative on this track.

danger_horse.name: Sideact
danger_horse.reason: Blinkers applied first time could spark sharp improvement despite the wide draw.

exotic_strategy.strategy: Box Exacta 2,3,4. Low confidence maiden with first starters.

selections.name: Fashion Spree
selections.reason: Draws the absolute premium barrier 1 for this track bias. Has solid wet track form and drops back in trip with blinkers off.

selections.name: Sunny Quarters
selections.reason: Ran a very respectable 4th on debut at this track and distance on heavy going. Gets a great inside draw to save ground.

selections.name: Expensive Icon
selections.reason: Solid debut 3rd at this track and distance on heavy ground. Wide draw is the main concern here.

selections.name: Nulkaba Star
selections.reason: Consistent form with multiple placings, but the extreme wide barrier is a massive penalty at Taree.

danger_horse.name: Nulkaba Star
danger_horse.reason: Has the class and form to win, but must overcome a massive track bias disadvantage from out wide.

selections.name: Hold My Drink
selections.reason: Strong form lines including a narrow 2nd at Canberra last start. Looks the testing material in this field.

selections.name: The Big Ticket
selections.reason: Excellent recent form at this track on heavy going. Draws perfectly in barrier 2 to utilize the on-pace bias.

selections.name: Firey Truth
selections.reason: Kris Lees and Aaron Bullock combination commands respect. Gets a great inside draw to improve second-up.

selections.name: Czech Her Out
selections.reason: Solid 4th at Port Macquarie last start and has shown ability on wet tracks previously.

danger_horse.name: Firey Truth
danger_horse.reason: Elite trainer/jockey combo. Capable of sharp improvement second-up from a good gate.

selections.name: Bridego
selections.reason: Tried to lead throughout last start and was only caught late. Excellent inside draw suits the Taree bias perfectly.

selections.name: Microgravity
selections.reason: Won well at Port Macquarie on a heavy track two starts back. Wide draw is tricky but has the ability.

selections.name: Nikody's Casper
selections.reason: Ran 5th at this track on heavy ground last start. Gets the ultimate inside draw to save ground.

selections.name: Rock'n On Uptown
selections.reason: Faded last start but gets a favorable inside draw here and has placed on heavy ground previously.

danger_horse.name: Rock'n On Uptown
danger_horse.reason: Can bounce back from a poor run with the advantage of an inside barrier on a biased track.

selections.name: Prince Is Game
selections.reason: Won well at this track and distance on heavy ground three starts back. Great inside draw to sit on the pace.

selections.name: Nature Boy
selections.reason: Scored a big win at Ballina on heavy going last start. Loves the wet and draws perfectly.

selections.name: Argerich
selections.reason: Won at Port Macquarie on heavy ground recently. Good draw and handles the conditions well.

selections.name: Yorikiri
selections.reason: Won at Port Macquarie on heavy ground three starts back. Fair draw and drops in class.

danger_horse.name: Yorikiri
danger_horse.reason: Has proven heavy track form and will appreciate the drop back to BM58 grade.

selections.name: Dam Impact
selections.reason: Won at this track on heavy ground three starts back. Gets a great inside draw to utilize the track bias.

selections.name: Miss Dee Reign
selections.reason: Solid 3rd at Scone last start. Draws well inside and maps to get a perfect run.

selections.name: Barcelona Express
selections.reason: Ran 3rd at this track on heavy ground last start. Wide draw is a negative but has the form to feature.

selections.name: Scotland
selections.reason: Drops significantly in class from Open company. Fair draw and has won on heavy ground previously.

danger_horse.name: Scotland
danger_horse.reason: Class dropper who can easily bounce back against this weaker BM58 field.

selections.name: Love Rat
selections.reason: Excellent 2nd at Coffs Harbour on heavy ground last start. Gets the ultimate barrier 1 advantage on this tight track.

selections.name: Catchy Tunes
selections.reason: Won well at Queanbeyan last start. Draws perfectly in barrier 2 to sit on the pace.

selections.name: Cool Fizz
selections.reason: Resuming but won a recent trial. Has won first-up previously and gets a fair draw.

selections.name: The Piccolino
selections.reason: Won at this track on heavy ground last start, but the extreme wide barrier is a massive penalty.

danger_horse.name: The Piccolino
danger_horse.reason: Track and distance winner last start, but must overcome a massive track bias disadvantage from barrier 15.

selections.name: Smashing Nova
selections.reason: Broke maiden well at Port Macquarie last start. Draws perfectly inside to utilize the on-pace bias.

selections.name: Incantress
selections.reason: Solid 5th at Newcastle last start. Drops in class and has placed on heavy ground previously.

selections.name: Smart Jazz
selections.reason: Ran 7th at this track on heavy ground last start. Fair draw and can improve.

selections.name: I'm Super
selections.reason: Ran 2nd at this track on heavy ground last start, but the extreme wide barrier is a massive negative.

danger_horse.name: I'm Super
danger_horse.reason: Has the form to win but must overcome a severe track bias disadvantage from the outside gate.
